license: CC BY-NC-SA 3.0 (Fandom default Terms of Use)
attribution: Each row in CSV `sources` column carries branch name + neuron permalink. Per Fandom CC BY-NC-SA, derivative works (e.g., wiring into data/core/) must preserve attribution and apply same license.

gaps.effect_trigger_split: Heuristic split between effect_short and unlock_trigger_hint based on imperative keywords (TAP/HOLD/SPRINT/COMBINE/etc.). Some rows may have empty unlock_trigger_hint when wiki description has no UI hint, or trigger_hint may carry leading "TAP (button)" copy needing manual cleanup.
gaps.image_codes_with_suffix: Some neurons share image codes with -2/-3/-4 suffixes (e.g., BB SX 01-2). All preserved as distinct rows per wiki convention.
gaps.no_individual_page_fetch: Effect descriptions taken from branch overview tables (sufficient signal). Individual neuron pages not fetched (would add ~297 requests, low marginal value vs branch tables).

notes_for_review: Pre-existing 01B dump has richer trigger_hints (manually curated). v07 wiki recovery has machine-extracted hints — may need normalization pass before merge.
OD-011 Path B closure: this CSV provides candidate pool for RFC v0.2 mapping → trait_mechanics.yaml.

next_phase_handoff.task: User review v07 CSV → diff against 01B sanitized → produce merged v08 with conflict resolution + manual trigger_hint polish.
do_not: wire into trait_mechanics.yaml without RFC review
